programs.title: Flutter Development Internship
programs.description: Master cross-platform mobile development using Flutter and Dart. Build real-world apps with state management, clean architecture, and responsive designs.
programs.eligibility: Open to Computer Science students and developers with basic coding knowledge.

programs.title: AI & Machine Learning Program
programs.description: Explore neural networks, natural language processing, and deep learning algorithms.
programs.eligibility: Basic knowledge of Python, Linear Algebra, and Calculus.

programs.title: Full Stack Development Track
programs.description: Become a full-stack engineer. Build scalable backend systems with Node.js and robust frontends using React.
programs.eligibility: Prior understanding of HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript.

programs.title: Cybersecurity Internship
programs.description: Deep dive into network security, ethical hacking, and vulnerability scanning.

programs.title: Data Science Bootcamp
programs.description: Extract knowledge and insights from structured and unstructured data.
programs.eligibility: Enthusiasm for data analysis. No hard coding prerequisite.

programs.title: UI/UX Design Program
programs.description: Master the user experience design process from research to prototyping.
programs.eligibility: Creative mindset and passion for digital product design.
